ddls:
CREATE TABLE "parks" (
  "park_key" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each park */,
  "park_name" TEXT /* Name of the park or stadium */,
  "park_alias" TEXT /* Alias or alternative name for the park */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the park is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the park is located */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the park is located */,
  "park_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the park */,
  "park_area" REAL /* Area of the park in square meters */,
  "park_capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum number of visitors the park can accommodate */,
  "park_opening_hours" TEXT /* Opening and closing hours of the park */,
  "park_website" TEXT /* Official website of the park */,
  "park_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the park */,
  "park_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the park */,
  "park_address" TEXT /* Full address of the park */,
  "park_type" TEXT /* Type of park (e.g., public, private, community) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("park_key")
)

CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "park_key" TEXT /* Reference to the park where the event is held */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date when the event is held */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., concert, sports, community) */,
  "event_start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the event */,
  "event_end_time" TEXT /* End time of the event */,
  "event_organizer" TEXT /* Name of the event organizer */,
  "event_ticket_price" REAL /* Ticket price for the event */,
  "event_capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum number of attendees for the event */,
  "event_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the event */,
  "event_status" TEXT /* Current status of the event (e.g., planned, ongoing, completed, canceled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_park_key FOREIGN KEY ("park_key") REFERENCES parks ("park_key")
)

CREATE TABLE "vendors" (
  "vendor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vendor */,
  "vendor_name" TEXT /* Name of the vendor */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the vendor */,
  "park_key" TEXT /* Reference to the park where the vendor operates */,
  "vendor_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the vendor */,
  "vendor_website" TEXT /* Official website of the vendor */,
  "vendor_address" TEXT /* Full address of the vendor */,
  "vendor_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the vendor's services */,
  "vendor_status" TEXT /* Status of the vendor (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vendor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vendors_park_key FOREIGN KEY ("park_key") REFERENCES parks ("park_key")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance" (
  "maintenance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance activity */,
  "park_key" TEXT /* Reference to the park requiring maintenance */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date when maintenance was performed */,
  "activity_description" TEXT /* Description of the maintenance activity */,
  "maintenance_start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the maintenance activity */,
  "maintenance_end_time" TEXT /* End time of the maintenance activity */,
  "maintenance_cost" REAL /* Cost of the maintenance activity */,
  "maintenance_status" TEXT /* Status of the maintenance activity (e.g., planned, ongoing, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maintenance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_park_key FOREIGN KEY ("park_key") REFERENCES parks ("park_key")
)

CREATE TABLE "financials" (
  "financial_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial record */,
  "park_key" TEXT /* Reference to the park */,
  "financial_year" TEXT /* Fiscal year for the financial record */,
  "financial_quarter" TEXT /* Fiscal quarter for the financial record */,
  "revenue" REAL /* Total revenue generated */,
  "expenses" REAL /* Total expenses incurred */,
  "profit" REAL /* Profit (revenue - expenses) */,
  "financial_notes" TEXT /* Any notes or comments related to the financial record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("financial_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financials_park_key FOREIGN KEY ("park_key") REFERENCES parks ("park_key")
)

CREATE TABLE "security" (
  "security_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each security activity */,
  "park_key" TEXT /* Reference to the park */,
  "security_date" TEXT /* Date when the security activity was performed */,
  "activity_log" TEXT /* Log of security activities */,
  "security_start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the security activity */,
  "security_end_time" TEXT /* End time of the security activity */,
  "security_type" TEXT /* Type of security activity (e.g., patrol, surveillance, emergency drill) */,
  "security_cost" REAL /* Cost of the security activity */,
  "security_status" TEXT /* Status of the security activity (e.g., planned, ongoing, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("security_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_security_park_key FOREIGN KEY ("park_key") REFERENCES parks ("park_key")
)

CREATE TABLE "permits" (
  "permit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permit */,
  "park_key" TEXT /* Reference to the park */,
  "permit_type" TEXT /* Type of permit or certification */,
  "issue_date" TEXT /* Date when the permit was issued */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date when the permit expires */,
  "permit_cost" REAL /* Cost of the permit */,
  "permit_issuer" TEXT /* Issuing authority of the permit */,
  "permit_status" TEXT /* Status of the permit (e.g., active, expired, revoked) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permits_park_key FOREIGN KEY ("park_key") REFERENCES parks ("park_key")
)

CREATE TABLE "inspections" (
  "inspection_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inspection */,
  "park_key" TEXT /* Reference to the park */,
  "inspection_date" TEXT /* Date when the inspection was conducted */,
  "inspection_result" TEXT /* Result of the inspection */,
  "inspector_name" TEXT /* Name of the inspector */,
  "inspection_cost" REAL /* Cost of the inspection */,
  "inspection_notes" TEXT /* Any notes or comments related to the inspection */,
  "inspection_status" TEXT /* Status of the inspection (e.g., passed, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inspection_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inspections_park_key FOREIGN KEY ("park_key") REFERENCES parks ("park_key")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, manager, staff) */,
  "park_key" TEXT /* Reference to the park the user is associated with */,
  "user_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the user */,
  "user_address" TEXT /* Full address of the user */,
  "user_status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_park_key FOREIGN KEY ("park_key") REFERENCES parks ("park_key")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the PIMS */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the PIMS was accessed */,
  "activity_description" TEXT /* Description of the activity performed by the user */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time when the PIMS was accessed */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address from which the PIMS was accessed */,
  "access_device" TEXT /* Device used to access the PIMS (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "access_status" TEXT /* Status of the access event (e.g., successful, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
